privileged_info_summary: The environment runs a local JFrog Artifactory instance at http://localhost:8082 with default credentials (admin / password). The task requires the creation of multiple entities for security hardening: a non-admin user 'svc-deploy' (email: 'svc-deploy@apex-healthcare.com'), a group 'ci-services' containing the new user, a local npm repository named 'npm-builds', a permission target 'svc-deploy-perms' granting 'ci-services' Deploy and Read access to 'npm-builds', and an access token with the description 'Service account token - Q1 2026 rotation'. All target parameters are strictly evaluated by the verifier.
